reported_papers.title: When Does LeJEPA Learn a World Model?
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26379v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: A representation that scrambles the true degrees of freedom of the world cannot support reliable planning or compositional generalization. reported_papers.title: FM-fMRI: Event Conditioned Flow Matching for Rest-to-Task fMRI Time-Series Synthesis
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26423v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Task-based fMRI provides a direct readout of task-evoked neural dynamics, but it is expensive and difficult to acquire at scale, motivating rest-to-task synthesis from widely available resting-state fMRI (rsfMRI). reported_papers.reason: 医疗影像fMRI时间序列合成，使用流匹配方法，与机器人操作完全无关。

reported_papers.title: Identifiable Token Correspondence for World Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.16457v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Token-based transformer world models have shown strong performance in visual reinforcement learning, but often suffer from temporal inconsistency in long-horizon rollouts, including object duplication, disappearance, and transmutation. reported_papers.reason: 解决基于Token的世界模型中长程Rollout的时间不一致性问题，提出可识别的Token对应机制。属世界模型底层改进，非VLA高层策略。

reported_papers.title: Olaf-World: Orienting Latent Actions for Video World Modeling
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2602.10104v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Scaling action-controllable world models is limited by the scarcity of action labels. reported_papers.title: DSA-Tokenizer: Disentangled Semantic-Acoustic Tokenization via Flow Matching-based Hierarchical Fusion
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2601.09239v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Speech tokenizers are a key building block of fully discrete Speech LLMs. Existing tokenizers either prioritize semantic encoding, fuse semantic content with acoustic style inseparably, or achieve incomplete semantic-acoustic disentanglement. reported_papers.reason: 语音LLM的Tokenizer研究，涉及语义-声学解耦，与机器人视觉-语言-动作模态无关。

reported_papers.title: Recursive Flow Matching
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26535v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Generative models have emerged as a powerful paradigm for solving physics systems and modeling complex spatiotemporal dynamics. reported_papers.title: Synergetic Empowerment: Wireless Communications Meets Embodied Intelligence
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2509.10481v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Wireless communication is evolving into an agent era, where large-scale agents with inherent embodied intelligence are not just users but active participants. reported_papers.title: Capability and Robustness Cannot Both Be Free: An Information-Theoretic Bound for Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.25889v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are increasingly deployed on real robots, where each predicted action is executed and each failure carries a safety cost. reported_papers.reason: 从信息论角度推导VLA模型能力与鲁棒性的权衡边界，揭示对抗攻击下的脆弱性根源。提供理论指导，帮助理解VLA安全极限。

reported_papers.title: Probabilistic Recurrent Intention Switching Model
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26998v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Inverse reinforcement learning (IRL) recovers reward functions from observed behavior, yet traditional methods assume a single stationary reward that cannot capture goal switching within an episode. reported_papers.reason: 提出概率循环意图切换模型，从观察行为中恢复非平稳奖励函数。侧重逆强化学习理论，未明确应用于VLA端到端控制。

reported_papers.title: Scaling World-Model Reinforcement Learning Through Diffusion Policy Optimization
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26282v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Model-based reinforcement learning (RL) can be effectively supported at scale through the use of world models. reported_papers.reason: 提出通过扩散策略优化扩展世界模型强化学习，解决模型偏差和误差累积问题。结合Diffusion Policy与世界模型，为大规模MBRL提供新路径。

reported_papers.title: MVISTA-4D: View-Consistent 4D World Model with Test-Time Action Inference for Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2602.09878v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: World-model-based imagine-then-act becomes a promising paradigm for robotic manipulation, yet existing approaches typically support either purely image-based forecasting or reasoning over partial 3D geometry, limiting their ability to predict complete 4D scene dynamics. reported_papers.reason: 提出MVISTA-4D，构建视图一致的4D世界模型并支持测试时动作推断。结合世界模型与VLA，提升复杂几何推理能力，具有显著技术价值。

reported_papers.title: TrackRef3D: Multi-View Consistent Track-then-Label for Open-World Referring Segmentation in 3D Gaussian Splatting
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26576v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Referring 3D Gaussian Splatting (R3DGS), which utilizes natural language for 3D object segmentation, has emerged as a crucial capability for embodied AI. reported_papers.reason: 提出TrackRef3D，在3D高斯泼溅中实现多视图一致的开放世界指代分割。虽服务于具身AI感知，但核心贡献在于3D视觉算法，非VLA决策层。

reported_papers.title: Bridging the Semantic-Action Gap in Visual Token Pruning for Efficient VLA Inference
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2511.16449v5 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown great potential for embodied AI by integrating visual perception, language understanding, and action execution. reported_papers.title: Neuro-Inspired Inverse Learning for Planning and Control
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.24152v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: We present a neuro-inspired framework for embodied planning and control. reported_papers.title: Aligning Few-Step Generative Models by Amortizing Sample-based Variational Inference
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26552v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Aligning a few-step generative model is challenging, since existing alignment frameworks typically rely on restrictive assumptions: a tractable likelihood, a specific ODE/SDE solver, or a particular model family. reported_papers.reason: 纯生成模型对齐方法研究，涉及变分推断和ODE/SDE求解器，无机器人操作或Embodied AI应用场景。

reported_papers.title: Advancing Creative Physical Intelligence in Large Multimodal Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26396v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Large multimodal models (LMMs) have rapidly advanced in perception and reasoning; however, it remains unclear whether these capabilities generalize to discovering visually grounded solutions in open-ended environments, beyond pattern recognition. reported_papers.title: Continual Model-Based Reinforcement Learning with Hypernetworks
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2009.11997v3 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Effective planning in model-based reinforcement learning (MBRL) and model-predictive control (MPC) relies on the accuracy of the learned dynamics model. reported_papers.title: Riding the Shifting Potential: When Reactive Control Suffices for Multi-Goal Behavior
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.27314v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reactive control is often considered insufficient for multi-objective tasks because conflicting objectives give rise to local minima. reported_papers.title: FineVLA: Fine-Grained Instruction Alignment for Steerable Vision-Language-Action Policies
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.27284v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are increasingly expected to not only complete robot tasks, but also follow human instructions about how those tasks should be executed. reported_papers.reason: 提出FineVLA，实现细粒度指令对齐以增强VLA策略的可控性。解决现有数据集仅匹配粗粒度目标的问题，提升对执行过程指令的遵循能力。

reported_papers.title: VR-DAgger: Immersive VR for Dexterous Data Collection and Uncertainty-Guided On-Policy Correction
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.27114v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Learning from demonstrations is effective for robotic manipulation, but collecting sufficient task-specific data remains a major bottleneck. reported_papers.title: Towards Shared Embodied Intelligence in Humanoid Robots through Optimization Development and Testing of the Human Aware ergoCub Robot
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26991v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Collaboration is central to human behavior, enabling tasks beyond individual capability. reported_papers.title: Can VLA Models Learn from Real-World Data Continually without Forgetting?

reported_papers.title: On the Generalization Capabilities, Design Choices and Limitations of Keypoint Imitation Learning

reported_papers.title: HyperSim: A Holistic Sim-To-Real Framework For Robust Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26638v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Scaling data volume and diversity is critical for generalizing embodied intelligence. reported_papers.title: Efficient On-policy Visual-RL via Stochastic Decoupled Policy Gradient

reported_papers.title: PhyPush: One Push is All You Need for Sensorless Physical Property Estimation with Physics-Guided Transformers
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.26284v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Accurately estimating object mass and friction is fundamental to achieving reliable and adaptive robotic manipulation. reported_papers.title: LIBERO-PRO: Towards Robust and Fair Evaluation of Vision-Language-Action Models Beyond Memorization
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2510.03827v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: LIBERO has emerged as a widely adopted benchmark for evaluating Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models; however, its current training and evaluation settings are problematic, often leading to inflated performance estimates and preventing fair model comparison. reported_papers.title: SpecPrune-VLA: Accelerating Vision-Language-Action Models via Action-Aware Self-Speculative Pruning

reported_papers.title: World-VLA-Loop: Closed-Loop Learning of Video World Model and VLA Policy
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2602.06508v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Reinforcement learning (RL) can refine Vision-Language-Action (VLA) policies beyond behavior cloning, but real-world RL remains expensive due to extensive rollouts, resets, supervision, and safety risks. reported_papers.reason: 提出 World-VLA-Loop，实现视频世界模型与 VLA 策略的闭环联合学习。解决真实世界 RL 昂贵且危险的核心瓶颈，在多个基准上展现显著优于 BC 的泛化能力。

reported_papers.title: Efficient Long-Horizon Vision-Language-Action Models via Static-Dynamic Disentanglement
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2602.03983v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have recently emerged as a promising paradigm for generalist robotic control. reported_papers.title: Language Movement Primitives: Grounding Language Models in Robot Motion
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2602.02839v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Enabling robots to perform novel manipulation tasks from natural language instructions remains a fundamental challenge in robotics, despite significant progress in generalized problem solving with foundational models. reported_papers.title: NeuralTouch: Neural Descriptors for Precise Sim-to-Real Tactile Robot Control
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2510.20390v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Grasping accuracy is a critical prerequisite for precise object manipulation, often requiring careful alignment between the robot hand and object. reported_papers.title: INSIGHT: INference-time Sequence Introspection for Generating Help Triggers in Vision-Language-Action Models

reported_papers.title: AgentGrounder: Zero-Shot 3D Visual Pointcloud Grounding using Multimodal Language Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.25901v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: 3D Visual Grounding (3DVG) is an essential capability for embodied AI, requiring agents to localize objects in 3D scenes based on natural language descriptions. reported_papers.title: Understanding the Impact of Geometric Foundation Models on Vision-Language-Action Models

reported_papers.title: Beyond Predefined Learning Objects: A Thinking-Learning Interaction Model for Up-to-Date Autonomous Robot Learning
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23987v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Autonomous robots operating in open and changing environments cannot always rely on predefined inputs, outputs, and action routines. reported_papers.title: OASIS: Observation-Action Space Alignment via SE(3) Trajectory Prediction for Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.25829v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent vision-language-action (VLA) models and world action models (WAMs) advance robotic manipulation by enriching intermediate representations with auxiliary spatial features or future visual-state prediction. reported_papers.title: Compliant Non-Prehensile Pushing Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.25672v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: In this paper, we address the challenge of performing non-prehensile pushing operations with a compliant robotic manipulation system. reported_papers.title: TapSampling: Inference-Time Sampling with a Task-Progress-Understanding Verifier for Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.25547v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Existing embodied control research demonstrates remarkable performance improvements by scaling training data and model size. reported_papers.title: RepSAM: Bridging Foundation Models to Robotic Vision via Representation-Guided Adaptation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.25495v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Robotic perception in unstructured environments remains challenging despite the zero-shot capabilities of foundation models such as SAM. reported_papers.title: InvariantCloud: A Globally Invariant, Uniquely Indexed Point Cloud Framework for Robust 6-DoF Tactile Pose Tracking
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.25216v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent advances in imitation learning and vision-language models highlight the need for high-fidelity tactile perception, with 6-DoF tactile object pose estimation providing a crucial foundation for precise robotic manipulation. reported_papers.reason: 构建全局不变且唯一索引的点云框架，用于鲁棒的 6-DoF 触觉姿态跟踪。聚焦触觉感知底层技术，虽对灵巧操作重要但未直接整合进 VLA 决策闭环。

reported_papers.title: X-DiffVLA: X-Embodied Diffusion Action Heads for Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.25044v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Learning universal policies from cross-embodied data remains a fundamental challenge in robotics. reported_papers.reason: 提出跨实体扩散动作头 X-DiffVLA，解决多实体数据统一策略学习的挑战。无需针对特定实体微调即可实现跨平台迁移，增强 VLA 通用性。

reported_papers.title: HumanEgo: Zero-Shot Robot Learning from Minutes of Human Egocentric Videos
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.24934v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Human egocentric video captures rich manipulation demonstrations without any robot hardware, yet transferring these skills to robots remains challenging due to the embodiment gap between human and robot in both visual appearance and kinematics. reported_papers.title: Learning High-Frequency Continuous Action Chunks in Latent Space
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.24931v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Modern robotic policies increasingly rely on action chunking to execute complex tasks in the physical world. reported_papers.reason: 探索潜在空间中高频连续动作分块的学习，以弥补中等频率下的时间一致性不足。侧重于动作表示细节优化，未涉及 VLA 整体架构或数据效率突破。

reported_papers.title: MuJoCoUni:Persistent Batched Runtime Primitives for MuJoCo
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.24922v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We present MuJoCoUni, a downstream MuJoCo distribution for online robot learning and batched physics evaluation. reported_papers.reason: 为 MuJoCo 提供持久化批量运行时原语，支持在线机器人学习和批量物理评估。显著加速仿真环境下的 VLA 训练与评估流程，工程价值高。

reported_papers.title: Sum of Costs Diffusion with Dynamic Guidance for Motion Planning
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.24690v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: The motion planning problem for robotic manipulation can be addressed through classical or deep learning approaches. reported_papers.title: Smoother Action Chunking Flow Policy via Prior-Corrected Orthogonal Trust-Region Guidance
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.24433v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Flow-matching robot policies commonly use action-chunking inference for efficient closed-loop control, but chunk boundaries can introduce discontinuous action transitions. reported_papers.title: RoboHitch: Learning Visual Affordance from Disordered Keypoints for Hitch Knots Tying
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.24394v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Robotic manipulation of deformable linear objects (DLOs) presents significant challenges due to complex dynamics and frequent self-occlusions. reported_papers.title: Afford-VLA: Action-Aligned Visual Planning via Internalized Affordance
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.24203v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models have shown strong potential for generalist robot manipulation, yet they remain limited by insufficient spatial reasoning, particularly in determining where to interact in complex visual scenes. reported_papers.reason: 通过内部化 affordance 机制增强 VLA 的空间推理能力，解决复杂场景中交互点定位难题。引入动作对齐的视觉规划模块，显著提升操作精度。

reported_papers.title: EXPO-FT: Sample-Efficient Reinforcement Learning Finetuning for Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: The ability to efficiently and reliably learn new tasks has been a foundational challenge in robotics. reported_papers.reason: 提出针对 VLA 的样本高效 RL 微调框架 EXPO-FT，解决预训练策略在真实任务中可靠性不足的问题。提供可复用的 RL 精调方案，提升 VLA 在特定任务上的表现。

reported_papers.title: Next-Latent Prediction Transformers Learn Compact World Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2511.05963v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Transformers replace recurrence with a memory that grows with sequence length and self-attention that enables ad-hoc lookups over past tokens. reported_papers.title: World Machine: Towards Generative World Modeling for Time-Series
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23025v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: World models represent a paradigm shift in generative AI, pursuing predictive understanding and controllable simulation of environments in a structured and generalizable way. reported_papers.title: HorizonDrive: Self-Corrective Autoregressive World Model for Long-horizon Driving Simulation

reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23070v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We propose Flow Mismatching, an unsupervised anomaly detection method that deliberately avoids reconstruction-based paradigms. reported_papers.title: Diffusion and Flow Matching Models for Tabular Data: A Survey
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2502.17119v2 Announce Type: replace-cross Abstract: Deep generative models have made rapid progress in image, text, audio, and video generation, and are increasingly being applied to structured records. reported_papers.title: How Mobile World Model Guides GUI Agents?

reported_papers.title: Robotic Strawberry Harvesting with Robust Vision and Deep Reinforcement Learning based Sim-to-Real Control
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23863v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: This study presents a closed-loop robotic strawberry harvesting system that combines a robust vision module, simulation-trained deep reinforcement learning (DRL) control, and ROS-based realrobot execution. reported_papers.title: Direct Dynamic Retargeting for Humanoid Imitation Learning from Videos
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23762v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Imitation Learning from monocular video demonstrations provides a scalable approach for teaching complex skills to humanoid robots. reported_papers.title: ComPose: When to Trust Hands for Object Pose Tracking
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23523v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Reconstructing the motion of objects from videos is a key component for embodied AI and robot manipulation. reported_papers.title: VGAS: Value-Guided Action-Chunk Selection for Few-Shot Vision-Language-Action Adaptation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2602.07399v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Vision--Language--Action (VLA) models bridge multimodal reasoning with physical control, but adapting them to new tasks with scarce demonstrations remains unreliable. reported_papers.title: V-VLAPS: Value-Guided Planning for Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2601.00969v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models provide strong action priors for robotic manipulation, but their reactive behavior can fail under distribution shift and long-horizon task structure. reported_papers.title: LACY: A Vision-Language Model-based Language-Action Cycle for Self-Improving Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2511.02239v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Learning generalizable policies for robotic manipulation increasingly relies on large-scale models that map language instructions to actions (L2A). reported_papers.title: USIM and U0: A Vision-Language-Action Dataset and Model for General Underwater Robots
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2510.07869v4 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Underwater environments pose unique challenges for robotic navigation and manipulation. reported_papers.title: GAF: Gaussian Action Field as a 4D Representation for Dynamic World Modeling in Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2506.14135v5 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Accurate scene perception is critical for vision-based robotic manipulation. reported_papers.title: ChainFlow-VLA: Causal Flow Planning with Vision-Language Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23270v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Current end-to-end autonomous driving systems are fundamentally limited by a mismatch between temporal causal reasoning and global trajectory consistency. reported_papers.title: IntentionNav: A Benchmark for Intent-Driven Object Navigation from Implicit Human Instruction
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.23187v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing object navigation benchmarks usually tell an embodied agent which object category to find, such as microwave or chair. reported_papers.title: SCRIPT: Scalable Diffusion Policy with Multi-stage Training for Language-driven Physics-Based Humanoid Control
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.22894v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Controlling physics-based humanoids from natural-language instructions is a critical step toward general-purpose embodied agents. reported_papers.title: GEM-4D: Geometry-Enhanced Video World Models for Robot Manipulation

reported_papers.title: $\pi_0$-EqM: Equilibrium Matching for Closed-Loop Vision-Language-Action Control

reported_papers.title: Agentic-VLA: Efficient Online Adaptation for Vision-Language-Action Models

reported_papers.reason: 提出在线适应机制，解决VLA模型在新环境中的泛化问题。提供可复用的自适应训练策略，适用于LIBERO等基准测试。

reported_papers.title: WorldKV: Efficient World Memory with World Retrieval and Compression
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.22718v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Autoregressive video diffusion models have enabled real-time, action-conditioned world generation. reported_papers.reason: 通过检索与压缩机制优化世界模型的记忆 KV Cache，解决长期一致性问题。为构建持久化、高效率的具身世界模型提供了关键的内存管理技术方案。

reported_papers.title: From Abstraction to Instantiation: Learning Behavioral Representation for Vision-Language-Action Model

reported_papers.title: LVDrive: Latent Visual Representation Enhanced Vision-Language-Action Autonomous Driving Model
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.22089v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have emerged as a promising framework for end-to-end autonomous driving. reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.21854v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have rapidly converged on a small set of architectural patterns: discrete-token autoregression (e.g. OpenVLA) and continuous-action flow-matching (e.g. pi-0.5). reported_papers.title: Reinforcing VLAs in Task-Agnostic World Models

reported_papers.title: DSSP: Diffusion State Space Policy with Full-History Encoding
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.14598v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Diffusion-based imitation learning has shown strong promise for robot manipulation. reported_papers.title: Noise-Space Attribution and Control of Chunk-Boundary Artifact

reported_papers.title: SONIC: Supersizing Motion Tracking for Natural Humanoid Whole-Body Control
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2511.07820v3 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Despite the rise of billion-parameter foundation models trained across thousands of GPUs, similar scaling gains have not been shown for humanoid control. reported_papers.title: SENIOR: Efficient Query Selection and Preference-Guided Exploration in Preference-based Reinforcement Learning

reported_papers.title: Pre-VLA: Preemptive Runtime Verification for Reliable Vision-Language-Action and World-Model Rollouts

reported_papers.title: stable-worldmodel: A Platform for Reproducible World Modeling Research and Evaluation

reported_papers.title: Spatial Memory for Out-of-Vision Manipulation in Vision-Language-Action

reported_papers.title: Action with Visual Primitives

reported_papers.title: TacO: Benchmarking Tactile Sensors for Object Manipulation

reported_papers.title: EvoScene-VLA: Evolving Scene Beliefs Inside the Action Decoder for Chunked Robot Control
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.21862v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Chunked vision-language-action (VLA) policies predict multi-step robot controls, conditioning each update on the current visual observation alone. reported_papers.title: Learning Robust Dexterous In-Hand Manipulation from Joint Sensors with Proprioceptive Transformer

reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.20433v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Contact-rich manipulation tasks such as tight-clearance insertion, connector mating, polishing, and surface-conforming wiping remain difficult for data-driven controllers because they couple discontinuous contact dynamics, partial observability, and strict safety constraints. reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.15157v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models are prone to compounding errors in dexterous manipulation, where high-dimensional action spaces and contact-rich dynamics amplify small policy deviations over long horizons. reported_papers.title: PointACT: Vision-Language-Action Models with Multi-Scale Point-Action Interaction

reported_papers.title: From swept contact to pose: Probe-aware registration via complementary-shape docking

reported_papers.title: Mobile UMI: Cross-View Diffusion Policy with Decoupled Kinematics for Mobile Manipulation

reported_papers.title: DISC: Decoupling Instruction from State-Conditioned Control via Policy Generation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.20856v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Language-conditioned manipulation policies typically process instructions and observations through shared network parameters. reported_papers.title: VLA-REPLICA: A Low-Cost, Reproducible Benchmark for Real-World Evaluation of Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.20774v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models have shown strong promise for general-purpose robotic manipulation, but their real-world evaluation remains limited by a lack of accessible, reproducible, and consistent benchmarks. reported_papers.title: GaussianDream: A Feed-Forward 3D Gaussian World Model for Robotic Manipulation

reported_papers.title: The Yes-Man Syndrome: Benchmarking Abstention in Embodied Robotic Agents
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.20544v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-language models (VLMs) are used as high-level planners for embodied agents, translating natural language instructions and visual observations into action plans. reported_papers.title: VBT-MPC: Vision-Based Tactile MPC for Contour Following

reported_papers.title: RoboMME: Benchmarking and Understanding Memory for Robotic Generalist Policies

reported_papers.title: Towards Long-Lived Robots: Continual Learning VLA Models via Reinforcement Fine-Tuning

reported_papers.title: Self-Supervised Bootstrapping of Action-Predictive Embodied Reasoning

reported_papers.title: CoLA-Flow Policy: Temporally Coherent Imitation Learning via Continuous Latent Action Flow Matching for Robotic Manipulation

reported_papers.reason: 通过视觉编码器接地对齐增强VLA的空间感知能力。针对2D预训练 backbone 缺乏3D几何监督的痛点，提供具体的对齐模块，有助于提升空间推理精度。

reported_papers.title: HeteroGenManip: Generalizable Manipulation For Heterogeneous Object Interactions
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.10201v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generalizable manipulation involving cross-type object interactions is a critical yet challenging capability in robotics. To reliably accomplish such tasks, robots must address two fundamental challenges: ``where to manipulate'' (contact point localization) and ``how to manipulate'' (subsequent interaction trajectory planning). Existing foundation-model-based approaches often adopt end-to-end learning that obscures the distinction between these sta
reported_papers.reason: 关注异构物体交互的可泛化操作。虽具挑战性，但摘要未展示超越现有VLA基准的架构创新，更像是一个特定任务领域的解决方案。

reported_papers.title: Retrieve-then-Steer: Online Success Memory for Test-Time Adaptation of Generative VLAs
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.10094v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models show strong potential for general-purpose robotic manipulation, yet their closed-loop reliability often degrades under local deployment conditions. Existing evaluations typically treat test episodes as independent zero-shot trials. However, real robots often operate repeatedly in the same or slowly changing environments, where successful executions provide environment-verified evidence of reliable behavior patter
reported_papers.reason: 提出检索-转向机制，利用在线成功记忆进行VLA测试时自适应。无需重新训练即可提升局部部署可靠性，方法轻量且具备即时应用潜力。

reported_papers.title: JODA: Composable Joint Dynamics for Articulated Objects
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.09954v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Articulated objects used in simulation and embodied AI are typically specified by geometry and kinematic structure, but lack the fine-grained dynamical effects that govern realistic mechanical behavior, such as frictional holding, detents, soft closing, and snap latching. Existing approaches either ignore the detailed structure of dynamics entirely, or use simple models with limited expressiveness. We introduce JODA, a framework for generating join
reported_papers.reason: 提出可组合的关节动力学模型以模拟铰接物体。主要贡献在于仿真物理引擎的逼真度，对VLA算法本身的创新影响有限。

reported_papers.title: Zero-Shot Sim-to-Real Robot Learning: A Dexterous Manipulation Study on Reactive Catching
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.09789v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Dexterous manipulation is physics-intensive and highly sensitive to modeling errors and perception noise, making sim-to-real transfer prohibitively challenging. Domain randomization (DR) is commonly used to improve the robustness of learned policies for such tasks, but conventional DR randomizes one instance per episode, offering very limited exposure to the variability of real-world dynamics. To this end, we propose Domain-Randomized Instance Set
reported_papers.reason: 研究灵巧手零样本Sim-to-Real抓取。侧重特定技能（抓取）的物理控制，非通用VLA架构或训练方法，应用场景较为局限。

reported_papers.title: SABER: A Scalable Action-Based Embodied Dataset for Real-World VLA Adaptation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.09613v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Robotic deployment in real-world environments depends on rich, domain-specific action data as much as on strong model architecture. General-purpose robot foundation models show modest performance in complex unseen tasks such as manipulation in a retail domain when applied out of the box. The root cause is a data gap: retail environments are structurally absent from general robot pretraining distributions, and the path to filling that gap through te
reported_papers.reason: 发布面向真实世界VLA适配的可扩展动作数据集。数据集类论文通常归为值得了解，除非其规模或质量引发范式变革，此处暂定为资源补充。

reported_papers.title: Drift is a Sampling Error: SNR-Aware Power Distributions for Long-Horizon Robotic Planning
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.09537v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Despite rapid progress in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models for robotic control, instruction drift remains a persistent failure mode in long-horizon tasks. This paper reconceptualizes this phenomenon, positing that instruction drift is fundamentally a systematic sampling error: local greedy sampling is prone to collapsing into "Negative Pivotal Windows"--irreversible local optima with high local probability that sever global success pathways. To
reported_papers.reason: 将指令漂移重新概念化为采样误差，并提出信噪比感知的功率分布。理论新颖但主要聚焦于规划层面的噪声调度，对VLA核心操作能力的提升间接。

reported_papers.title: RePO-VLA: Recovery-Driven Policy Optimization for Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.09410v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models remain brittle in long-horizon, contact-rich manipulation because success-only imitation provides little supervision for execution drift, while failed rollouts are often discarded. We introduce RePO-VLA, a recovery-driven policy optimization framework that assigns distinct roles to success, recovery, and failure trajectories. RePO-VLA first applies Recovery-Aware Initialization (RAI), slicing recovery segments an
reported_papers.reason: 引入恢复驱动的策略优化，利用失败回滚数据训练VLA从错误中恢复。直接针对接触丰富任务的鲁棒性，提供了新的训练信号来源，具有实质贡献。

reported_papers.title: Octopus Protocol: One-Shot Hardware Discovery and Control for AI Agents via Infrastructure-as-Prompts
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.09055v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Recent agentic-robotics systems, from Code-asPolicies to modern vision-language-action (VLA) foundation models, presuppose that drivers, SDKs, or ROS-style primitives for the target hardware already exist. Writing those primitives is the dominant engineering cost of bringing up new hardware for agent control. We present Octopus Protocol, a system that collapses that cost to a single shell command. Given only raw OS access and a language-model API k
reported_papers.reason: 提出通过基础设施即提示实现硬件的一次性发现与控制。解决了VLA Agent在不同硬件平台部署时的适配难题，提供了具体的工程协议和接口方案。

reported_papers.title: Towards Backdoor-Based Ownership Verification for Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.09005v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action models (VLAs) support generalist robotic control by enabling end-to-end decision policies directly from multi-modal inputs. As trained VLAs are increasingly shared and adapted, protecting model ownership becomes essential for secure deployment and responsible open-source usage. In this paper, we present GuardVLA, the first backdoor-based ownership verification framework specifically designed for VLAs. GuardVLA embeds a stealt
reported_papers.reason: 探索基于后门的水印技术用于VLA所有权验证。属于知识产权与安全交叉领域，对提升机器人操作性能无直接帮助，受众较窄。

reported_papers.title: Preserving Foundational Capabilities in Flow-Matching VLAs through Conservative SFT
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08879v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Unconstrained fine-tuning of flow-matching Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models drives dense parameter overwrites, degrading pre-trained capabilities. We present Conservative Supervised Fine-Tuning (ConSFT), an optimization objective that adapts to target distributions while mitigating catastrophic forgetting, requiring zero prior data or architectural overhead. By dynamically scaling learning signals based on model confidence, ConSFT suppresses exc
reported_papers.reason: 提出保守监督微调（ConSFT）以防止Flow-Matching VLA在微调中遗忘预训练能力。解决了灾难性遗忘这一关键痛点，方法简单有效，易于集成。

reported_papers.title: ElasticFlow: One-Step Physics-Consistent Policy with Elastic Time Horizons for Language-Guided Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08799v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Diffusion policies have demonstrated exceptional performance in embodied AI. However, their iterative denoising process results in high latency, and existing acceleration methods often sacrifice physical consistency. To address this, we propose ElasticFlow, a distillation-free, physics-consistent one-step policy framework. We reconstruct the Mean Field Theory by directly modeling the average velocity field, enabling a direct single-step mapping fro
reported_papers.reason: 提出弹性时间视野的单步物理一致策略，旨在解决扩散策略的高延迟问题。在保证物理一致性的同时实现加速，对实时控制应用有明确价值。

reported_papers.title: ProcVLM: Learning Procedure-Grounded Progress Rewards for Robotic Manipulation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08774v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Long-horizon robotic manipulation requires dense feedback that reflects how a task advances through its procedural stages, not merely whether the final outcome is successful. Existing reward models often rely on trajectory-level success labels or time-based interpolation, which can conflate elapsed time with true task progress and therefore fail to capture unfinished steps, stagnation, and failure states. We present ProcVLM, a progress-aware vision
reported_papers.reason: 结合VLM生成过程感知的进度奖励以支持长程操作。侧重于RL奖励塑造，而非VLA架构本身，且主要依赖仿真或特定设置，通用性待验证。

reported_papers.title: Geometry Guided Self-Consistency for Physical AI
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08638v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: State-of-the-art physical AI models generate a chunk of actions per inference through diffusion or flow matching, iteratively refining an initial noise sample into an action trajectory. Because this inference process is inherently stochastic, committing to a single trajectory per round is brittle, and this brittleness compounds across the many sequential rounds that comprise a complete episode. We introduce KeyStone, an inference-time self-consiste
reported_papers.reason: 利用几何引导的自我一致性来优化扩散/流匹配策略的随机性。属于推理阶段的启发式优化，未改变底层训练范式，贡献局限于特定推理场景。

reported_papers.title: ATAAT: Adaptive Threat-Aware Adversarial Tuning Framework against Backdoor Attacks on Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08612v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Addressing the escalating security vulnerabilities in Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models, this study investigates backdoor attacks targeting the visual pathway. We identify a core obstacle causing the failure of traditional attack paradigms: "Gradient Interference." This phenomenon represents an optimization failure triggered by conflicting strategies during end-to-end training. To resolve this, we propose an Adaptive Threat-Aware Adversarial Tuni
reported_papers.reason: 关注VLA模型的后门攻击防御与安全对齐。虽重要但属于安全子领域，不直接提升操作性能或泛化能力，对日常VLA开发者的优先级较低。

reported_papers.title: BEACON: Cross-Domain Co-Training of Generative Robot Policies via Best-Effort Adaptation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08571v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We introduce BEACON--Best-Effort Adaptation for Cross-Domain Co-Training--a theory-driven framework for training generative robot policies with abundant source demonstrations and limited target demonstrations. BEACON casts cross-domain co-training as a discrepancy-aware importance-reweighting problem, jointly learning a diffusion-based visuomotor policy and per-sample source weights that minimize an objective informed by target-domain generalizatio
reported_papers.reason: 提出基于最佳努力适应的跨域协同训练框架。主要解决源域与目标域数据分布差异，属于领域适应范畴，缺乏对VLA通用泛化能力的根本性突破证据。

reported_papers.title: Trajectory-Consistent Flow Matching for Robust Visuomotor Policy Learning
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08511v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Flow matching policies learn continuous velocity fields that transport noise to actions, enabling fast deterministic inference for robot manipulation. However, standard training optimizes a pointwise velocity objective while inference requires numerical integration of that field -- a mismatch that causes compounding trajectory errors. reported_papers.reason: 改进Flow Matching训练目标以保持一致性。虽涉及VLA核心算法，但摘要未展示跨Benchmark的显著优势或解决核心瓶颈的证据，视为算法层面的常规优化。

reported_papers.title: Failing Forward: Adaptive Failure-Informed Learning for Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08434v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-language-action (VLA) models provide a promising paradigm for scalable robotic manipulation, yet their reliance on success-only behavioral cloning leaves them brittle; lacking corrective training signals, minor execution errors rapidly compound into unrecoverable, out-of-distribution failures. To address this limitation, we propose Adaptive Failure-Informed Learning (AFIL), an end-to-end framework that leverages failure trajectories as adapt
reported_papers.reason: 针对VLA仅依赖成功数据导致脆弱的问题，引入自适应失败信息学习机制。通过利用失败轨迹提供纠正信号，显著提升长程任务鲁棒性，方法具体且有效。

reported_papers.title: Understanding Asynchronous Inference Methods for Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08168v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Vision-Language-Action (VLA) models offer a promising path to generalist robot control, but their inference latency causes observation staleness when generated actions are executed asynchronously. Several methods have been proposed concurrently to mitigate this problem: inference-time inpainting (IT-RTC), training-time delay simulation (TT-RTC), future-state-aware conditioning (VLASH), and lightweight residual correction (A2C2). Each takes a fundam
reported_papers.reason: 深入分析VLA异步推理导致的观测陈旧问题及现有缓解方法。为部署高延迟VLA模型提供关键的工程洞见和优化方向，对实际系统搭建极具参考价值。

reported_papers.title: CapVector: Learning Transferable Capability Vectors in Parametric Space for Vision-Language-Action Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: This paper proposes a novel approach to address the challenge that pretrained VLA models often fail to effectively improve performance and reduce adaptation costs during standard supervised finetuning (SFT). Some advanced finetuning methods with auxiliary training objectives can improve performance and reduce the number of convergence steps. However, they typically incur significant computational overhead due to the additional losses from auxiliary objectives. To simultaneously achieve the enhan
reported_papers.reason: 提出在参数空间学习可迁移的能力向量，以解决VLA微调中的适应成本问题。提供了一种新的参数高效微调思路，具有明确的工程复用价值。

reported_papers.title: StereoPolicy: Improving Robotic Manipulation Policies via Stereo Perception
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: Recent advances in robot imitation learning have yielded powerful visuomotor policies capable of manipulating a wide variety of objects directly from monocular visual inputs. However, monocular observations inherently lack reliable depth cues and spatial awareness, which are critical for precise manipulation in cluttered or geometrically complex scenes. To address this limitation, we introduce StereoPolicy, a new visuomotor policy learning framework that directly leverages synchronized stereo im
reported_papers.reason: 提出利用立体视觉增强单目VLA策略的深度感知能力。属于感知模态改进，非核心架构或训练范式突破，且未提及在多个主流Benchmark上的显著SOTA超越。

reported_papers.title: Flow Matching for Count Data
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07746v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: High-dimensional count data arise in applications such as single-cell RNA sequencing and neural spike trains, where mapping between distributions across successive batches or time points form critical components of data analysis. reported_papers.reason: 针对计数数据的流匹配方法。生物信息学/数据分析应用，无机器人操作。

reported_papers.title: Debiased Counterfactual Generation via Flow Matching from Observations
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07665v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Estimating counterfactual distributions under interventions is central to treatment risk assessment and counterfactual generation tasks. Existing approaches model the counterfactual distribution as a standalone generative target, without exploiting its relationship to the observational data. In this work, we show that under standard assumptions, observational and counterfactual outcome distributions are tightly linked: they have identical support
reported_papers.reason: 基于流匹配的无偏反事实生成。因果推断/统计学领域，非具身智能。

reported_papers.title: TRACE: Transport Alignment Conformal Prediction via Diffusion and Flow Matching Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07100v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Constructing valid and informative conformal prediction regions for multi-dimensional outputs remains a fundamental challenge. While conformal prediction provides finite-sample, distribution-free coverage guarantees, its practical performance critically depends on the choice of nonconformity score. Existing approaches often rely on restrictive geometric assumptions or require explicit likelihood evaluation and invertible transformations, limiting
reported_papers.reason: 基于扩散和流匹配的共形预测方法。统计学习/不确定性量化，无机器人应用。

reported_papers.title: Physics-Based Flow Matching for Full-Field Prediction of Silicon Photonic Devices
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.06929v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Designing photonic integrated circuits requires accurate electromagnetic field simulations, which remain computationally expensive even for simple device geometries. We present PIC-Flow, a generative neural surrogate that predicts electromagnetic field distributions for photonic devices given their geometry and operating wavelength as an alternative to costly finite-difference time-domain (FDTD) simulations. Our approach combines three key ideas:
reported_papers.reason: 基于物理的流匹配用于硅光子器件预测。科学计算/工程设计领域，非机器人操作。

reported_papers.title: Structured Coupling for Flow Matching
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07676v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Standard flow matching scales well but typically relies on an unstructured source distribution, limiting its ability to learn interpretable latent structure. Latent-variable models, by contrast, capture structure but often sacrifice generative quality. reported_papers.reason: 流匹配的结构性耦合方法研究。纯生成模型算法优化，无具身智能背景。

reported_papers.title: Tessellations of Semi-Discrete Flow Matching
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07513v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: We study Flow Matching in a semi-discrete setting where a Gaussian source is transported toward a discrete target supported on finitely many points. This semi-discrete regime is the theoretical setting behind the use of Flow Matching for generative modeling, where the target distribution is represented by a finite dataset. In this semi-discrete regime, the exact Flow Matching velocity field is available in closed form, which makes it possible to an
reported_papers.reason: 半离散流匹配的数学理论研究。纯生成模型理论基础，无机器人应用。

reported_papers.title: Neurosymbolic Imitation Learning with Human Guidance: A Privileged Information Approach
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07166v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Imitation learning is widely used for learning to act in complex environments. While pure neural-based methods handle high dimensional data effectively, they suffer from the requirement of large number of samples and are prone to overfitting. Pure symbolic approaches, while generalize well, do not handle high-dimensional data effectively. We propose a neurosymbolic approach that achieves the best of both worlds, i.e, handling high-dimensional data
reported_papers.reason: 结合神经符号方法与人类指导的模仿学习。方法相邻但缺乏VLA架构整合及大规模基准验证，暂归为值得了解。

reported_papers.title: Contrast-X: A Multi-Modal Contrast Image Synthesis Benchmark and Universal Modality Flow Matching
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2601.15884v2 Announce Type: replace Abstract: Contrast-enhanced imaging is central to oncologic diagnosis, but contrast agents can be contraindicated for many of the patients who need them most. Synthesizing contrast scans from non-contrast inputs is the natural response. Two obstacles stand in the way: no benchmark provides paired contrast data with lesion-level evaluation, and no single model handles the arbitrary missing patterns seen in practice. reported_papers.reason: 医学影像对比度合成基准与方法。医疗AI领域，与机器人操作无关。

reported_papers.title: A Unified Measure-Theoretic View of Diffusion, Score-Based, and Flow Matching Generative Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.06829v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: We survey continuous-time generative modeling methods based on transporting a simple reference distribution to a data distribution via stochastic or deterministic dynamics. We present a unified framework in which diffusion models, score-based generative models, and flow matching are instances of learning a time-dependent vector field that induces a family of marginals $(\rho_t)_{t \in [0,1]}$ governed by continuity and Fokker-Planck equations. reported_papers.reason: 扩散、分数匹配和流匹配的测度论统一视角综述。纯理论数学工作，不涉及具身智能。

reported_papers.title: On the Role of Strain and Vorticity in Numerical Integration Error for Flow Matching
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.06680v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Flow matching generates data by integrating a learned velocity field, where the number of integration steps (NFE) directly determines inference cost. We analyze which properties of the velocity field govern integration error by decomposing the velocity Jacobian into its symmetric part S (strain rate) and antisymmetric part Omega (vorticity). We prove that strain and vorticity play different roles: strain controls exponential error amplification t
reported_papers.reason: 流匹配数值积分误差的理论分析。纯数学/生成模型理论研究，无机器人应用。

reported_papers.title: ST-Gen4D: Embedding 4D Spatiotemporal Cognition into World Model for 4D Generation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07390v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Generative models have achieved success in producing apparently coherent 2D videos, but remain challenging in the physical world due to lack of 4D spatiotemporal scale. Typically, existing 4D generative models directly embed macro scale constraints to enhance overall spatiotemporal consistency. However, these methods only ensure global appearance coherence and fail to reveal the local dynamics of the physical world. Our insight is that global appea
reported_papers.reason: 4D时空生成的世界模型研究，侧重视频/体积数据生成。无机器人操作或具身智能应用场景。

reported_papers.title: GEM: Generating LiDAR World Model via Deformable Mamba
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07326v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: World models, which simulate environmental dynamics and generate sensor observations, are gaining increasing attention in autonomous driving. However, progress in LiDAR-based world models has lagged behind those built on camera videos or occupancy data, primarily due to two core challenges: the inherent disorder of LiDAR point clouds and the difficulty of distinguishing dynamic objects from static structures. To address these issues, we propose GEM
reported_papers.reason: 基于LiDAR的自动驾驶世界模型生成。聚焦自动驾驶感知，非机器人操作任务。

reported_papers.title: Flow-OPD: On-Policy Distillation for Flow Matching Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.08063v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Existing Flow Matching (FM) text-to-image models suffer from two critical bottlenecks under multi-task alignment: the reward sparsity induced by scalar-valued rewards, and the gradient interference arising from jointly optimizing heterogeneous objectives, which together give rise to a 'seesaw effect' of competing metrics and pervasive reward hacking. Inspired by the success of On-Policy Distillation (OPD) in the large language model community, we
reported_papers.reason: 针对流匹配模型的在线策略蒸馏方法，主要面向图像生成。未涉及机器人控制或具身智能应用。

reported_papers.title: Trajectory as the Teacher: Few-Step Discrete Flow Matching via Energy-Navigated Distillation
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07924v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Discrete flow matching generates text by iteratively transforming noise tokens into coherent language, but may require hundreds of forward passes. Distillation uses the multi-step trajectory to train a student to reproduce the process in a few steps. When the student underperforms, the usual explanation is insufficient capacity. reported_papers.reason: 关于离散流匹配的知识蒸馏方法，应用于文本生成。无机器人操作或具身智能背景，属于纯生成模型优化。

reported_papers.title: Predictive but Not Plannable: RC-aux for Latent World Models
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07278v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: A latent world model may achieve accurate short-horizon prediction while still inducing a latent space that is poorly aligned with planning. A key issue is spatiotemporal mismatch: these models are often trained with local predictive supervision, but deployed for long-horizon goal-directed search in latent spaces where Euclidean distance may not reflect what is reachable within a finite action budget. We present the Reachability-Correction auxili
reported_papers.reason: 揭示潜在世界模型预测准确但不可规划的问题，并提出RC-aux辅助训练。深入分析模型缺陷，但对VLA实际控制性能提升尚不明确。

reported_papers.title: Three-in-One World Model: Energy-Based Consistency, Prediction, and Counterfactual Inference for Marketing Intervention
reported_papers.abstract_snippet: arXiv:2605.07199v1 Announce Type: new Abstract: Marketing decisions reflect the interaction of latent consumer heterogeneity, time-varying internal states, and explicit interventions, a structure that current prediction- and language-oriented models do not capture in a unified manner. We propose a Three-in-One world-model architecture in which a Deep Boltzmann Machine (DBM) learns a frozen belief representation from demographics, time, and lagged actions and outcomes, with lightweight task-speci

reported_papers.title: AGWM: Affordance-Grounded World Models for Environments with Compositional Prerequisites

reported_papers.title: AgenticCache: Cache-Driven Asynchronous Planning for Embodied AI Agents

reported_papers.reason: 提出 ManipulationNet 全球基础设施，托管真实世界机器人操作基准任务。通过标准化任务设置实现可复现评估，解决真实世界变异性与科学评估可复现性的矛盾。

reported_papers.title: RoboLight: A Dataset with Linearly Composable Illumination for Robotic Manipulation

reported_papers.title: SkillVLA: Tackling Combinatorial Diversity in Dual-Arm Manipulation via Skill Reuse
reported_papers.reason: 提出 SkillVLA 解决双臂操作组合多样性挑战，支持技能复用。将已学习单臂技能在新型左右配对中重组，避免单独学习每种组合，提升双臂 VLA 可扩展性。 [Pass3降级: 将 2024 年前已有的分层技能复用概念应用于 VLA，缺乏架构创新。]

reported_papers.title: Learning Surgical Robotic Manipulation with 3D Spatial Priors

reported_papers.title: Cognition to Control - Multi-Agent Learning for Human-Humanoid Collaborative Transport
reported_papers.reason: 误命中：认知到控制 C2C 三层层次结构用于人 - 人形机器人协作运输。聚焦 HRC 而非 VLA 核心方法，与 VLA 架构/训练距离较远。

reported_papers.title: MEM: Multi-Scale Embodied Memory for Vision Language Action Models
reported_papers.reason: 提出多尺度具身记忆 MEM，结合长期语义记忆与短期事件记忆。长期记忆捕获抽象语义概念，短期记忆补偿遮挡，解决长视野多阶段真实任务的多粒度记忆表示瓶颈。 [Pass3降级: VLA 记忆模块方向已高度饱和，且与近期 TacMamba 历史压缩主题重复。]

reported_papers.title: LiteVLA-Edge: Quantized On-Device Multimodal Control for Embedded Robotics
reported_papers.reason: 面向部署的 VLA 流水线 LiteVLA-Edge，支持 Jetson Orin 完全设备端推理。结合 FP32 微调与 4-bit GGUF 量化，端到端延迟 150.5ms(6.6Hz)，ROS 2 集成完全离线运行。 [Pass3降级: 与 3 天前推荐的 QuantVLA 主题重复，且主要依赖现有量化工具集成。]

reported_papers.title: RoboCasa365: A Large-Scale Simulation Framework for Training and Benchmarking Generalist Robots
